task: Search for a new internal M2 Samsung SSD drive between $25 and $200.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the search on Best Buy and verified the result state. Evidence shows a direct filtered Best Buy Internal SSDs category URL with Brand=Samsung, Form Factor=M.2, Price=25 to 200, and Condition=New applied. On that page, Best Buy explicitly shows “M.2 and New Internal SSDs (1)” with the single matching item: Samsung 990 EVO SSD 1TB at $149.99, marked Sold Out. The agent also checked without the New filter and found 5 results total, with the additional items being refurbished. This satisfies the task of searching for a new internal M.2 Samsung SSD drive between $25 and $200, and correctly reports that only one matching new item exists on Best Buy and it is sold out.
final_result_response:
Verified using the direct Best Buy Internal SSDs category URL with all filters encoded:

- Brand: Samsung
- Form factor: M.2
- Condition: New
- Price: $25 to $200

Best Buy shows **1 result**:

**Samsung 990 EVO SSD 1TB Internal SSD PCIe Gen 4x4 / Gen 5x2 M.2 2280**  
Price: **$149.99**  
Rating: **4.8/5, 316 reviews**  
Status: **Sold Out**

I also checked without the New condition filter earlier: it showed **5 total results**, but the other 4 were Geek Squad Certified Refurbished items, and they were also sold out.

Conclusion: I don’t see any available new Samsung M.2 internal SSDs between $25 and $200 on Best Buy right now.
action_history: Opening Best Buy: const bb1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/');
Searching Best Buy for Samsung M.2 SSD: await page.locator('e9').fill('Samsung M.2 internal SSD');
Searching Best Buy for Samsung M.2 SSD: await page.locator('e10').click();
Filtering to new items: await page.locator('e50').click();
Removing New condition filter: await page.locator('e48').click();
Opening Internal SSDs category from results: await page.locator('e70').click();

Opening direct filtered Best Buy SSD URL: const bbDirect1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/site/searchpage.jsp?st=samsung+m.2+ssd&intl=nosplash&cp=1&_dyncharset=UTF-8&id=pcat17071&type=page&sc=Global&nrp=&sp=&qp=brand_facet%3DBrand~Samsung%5Eformfactor_facet%3DForm+Factor~M.2%5Ecurrentprice_facet%3DPrice~25+to+200%5Econdition_facet%3DCondition~New');
Opening SSD category directly: const bbCat1 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/site/hard-drives-ssds/internal-hard-drives-ssds/abcat0504001.c');
Choosing Internal SSDs category: await page.locator('e120').click();
Applying M.2 form factor: await page.locator('e30').click();
Searching brand filter for Samsung: await page.locator('e50').fill('Samsung');

Opening pre-filtered Internal SSDs category URL: const bbCatDirect2 = await openTab('https://www.bestbuy.com/site/hard-drives/internal-solid-state-drives/pcmcat1538498095184.c?id=pcmcat1538498095184&qp=brand_facet%3DBrand~Samsung%5Eformfactor_facet%3DForm+Factor~M.2%5Ecurrentprice_facet%3DPrice~25+to+200%5Econdition_facet%3DCondition~New');
